stories: Good morning Sean, it's Wednesday, the twenty-second of April, 2026
Here's a fun one to kick things off: the average cloud drifting above your head weighs around a million tonnes
They only float because their density sits about point four percent lower than the surrounding air
So next time one casts a shadow over you, consider that it's essentially a small mountain hanging in the sky
Looking at your day, your Saskatoon Wednesday is shaping up fairly open
The bi-monthly with Rahul and the midday Lunch hold both sit on Singapore time, so they'll roll through overnight for you — dial in if you want, otherwise they'll just tick past
That gives you a clean runway for heads-down work through the morning
Over in Singapore, a few things worth your attention
Good morning Sean, it's Tuesday, the twenty-first of April, 2026
On Venus, a single day is actually longer than an entire year
The planet rotates so slowly it takes about two hundred and forty-three Earth days to spin once on its axis, but only two hundred and twenty-five to orbit the Sun
So if you lived there, you'd have a birthday before you even finished breakfast
Assuming you're still on Saskatoon time, Safe Start is locked in for nine at the Wolverine complex, so that's the morning anchor
Your lunch hold and the monthly Paula catch-up both sit on Singapore time, so those land overnight for you and you can either dial in or let them roll to the following week
Apart from that, it's a relatively open Tuesday, which should give you some proper runway for heads-down work
Over in Singapore, a few things worth your attention
Good morning Sean, it's Monday, the twentieth of April, 2026
Twenty-one years on, more video gets added to YouTube every hour than any one person could watch in a lifetime
Not a bad trade for a trip to see some elephants
Looking at your day, you're still on Canadian hours out in Saskatoon
You've got a morning run pencilled in at seven, then an India-time forum session at eight, and after that a long focus block carved out from eight-twenty through to just before one
Heads up, Rahul is on leave today, so you're flying solo if anything lands in his court
Over in Singapore, a couple worth your attention
Oil is still up more than sixty percent since the conflict began, and Asia is feeling it
